{{Quote|Attention! At ease gentlemen. I'm Major Grode. |Grode, reporting to his squadron|<ref name="X-Wing Rogue Squadron 2">[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 2|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 2]]</ref>}}
'''Grode''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], who held the ranks of [[Major/Legends|Major]] and [[Wing Commander/Legends|Wing Commander]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cilpar]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|We have an opportunity to nab the whole bunch, including that vixen Elscol and her pet Wookiee. We're not taking any chances. Set lasers, lock on target, and fire as soon as we're in range...We'll blast them into atoms before they even know we're coming.|Grode, briefing the squadron before a mission|<ref name="X-Wing Rogue Squadron 2" />}}
[[File:Crimson_Squadron.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Grode in his modified [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptor]].]]

Major Grode commanded [[Crimson Squadron (Galactic Empire)|Crimson Squadron]] in defense of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Boren Tascl]]'s base at [[Kiidan]]. He accepted [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron's]] [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]] — in disguise as an Imperial officer at the time — into his squadron as it was scrambled to [[Mission to Cilpar|intercept]] the local resistance movement headed by [[Elscol Loro]]. He was shot down by Tycho's [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]], which was being piloted by [[Winter Celchu|Winter]] at the [[Time/Legends|time]].

==Equipments==
Unlike other [[TIE pilot]]s, he didn't wear a fully enclosed helmet and his armor's appearance is different as well. This is due to the fact that he modified his [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE interceptor]] by adding life support systems. Apart from the life support systems, his interceptor also featured longer wingtip laser cannon barrels which might be due to the fact that he upgraded them. The chin laser cannon hard points are missing.

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 2|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 2]] {{1st}}
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 3|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 3]] {{C|Starfighter and voice only}}
